However, in the context of a cylinder, the term might refer to the total length around the cylinder, which would include the two circular edges. So the perimeter would be the sum of the circumferences of the two bases plus the length of the cylinder's side.

arguments.code:
def perimeter(r, h):
    return 2 * r + 2 * h

assert perimeter(2, 4) == 12
assert perimeter(1, 2) == 6
assert perimeter(3, 1) == 8
